name: python3-et-xmlfile
title: python3-et-xmlfile
summary: low memory library for creating large XML files (Python 3)
description:
low memory library for creating large XML files (Python 3)
et_xmlfile is based upon the xmlfile module from lxml with the aim of
allowing code to be developed that will work with both libraries. It was
developed initially for the openpyxl project but is now a standalone module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-et-xmlfile because low memory library for creating large XML files (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-et-xmlfile as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-et-xmlfile with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-et-xmlfile --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
